detail: Shadow Court, Glenhaven, Tidefall, Twin Cities, The Wintermark, Lostfeld, Groth Clans, Gilgeth Clans, Vilefin, Varkuun, Dur Khadur, Dreadwind Isles, Stonebreak Monastery
lore: A new world has been forged. 13 factions (Shadow Court, Glenhaven, Tidefall, Twin Cities, The Wintermark, Lostfeld, Groth Clans, Gilgeth Clans, Vilefin, Varkuun, Dur Khadur, Dreadwind Isles, Stonebreak Monastery) now vie for dominance across Aeloria. The age begins — every throne is unsettled, every border unproven.
